title: Polish tavern doorway copy density
description: Reduce explanatory first-screen copy in the /tavern/:id doorway and keep the entry focused on coordinate, host NPC, and immediate actions.
next_action: Product owner can review the updated desktop/mobile doorway screenshots under .trellis/tmp/scene-setting-prose-evidence/.
If the starter prompt helper copy still feels too dense, treat it as a separate starter-chip compression pass.
notes: Completed frontend-only copy-density polish after user screenshot showed the doorway first viewport was dominated by explanatory copy such as how-to-play text and demo-seed boundary language. The doorway now presents compact coordinate anchor, immediate action buttons, and host NPC entry; duplicate Tavern mobile shell guide was removed; mobile dock clearance was added after the entry action card. No API/Schema/database changes. Validation: npm --prefix .\frontend run typecheck passed after sandbox EPERM required escalation; npm --prefix .\frontend run build passed after the same sandbox limitation required escalation; git diff --check passed; Playwright doorway/chat desktop+mobile self-acceptance passed with screenshots under .trellis/tmp/scene-setting-prose-evidence/; in-app Browser DOM check found 3 action buttons, no old explanatory terms, and no horizontal overflow.
